nasb.text: Now when his master heard the words of his wife, which she spoke to him, saying, “This is what your slave did to me,” his anger burned.

esv.text: As soon as his master heard the words that his wife spoke to him, “This is the way your servant treated me,” his anger was kindled.

cnv.text: 約瑟的主人聽了他妻子對他所說的話，說：“你的僕人就是這樣對待我。”他就非常生氣。

ccb.text: 波提乏听了妻子讲述约瑟如何对待她之后，勃然大怒，

csbs.text: 约瑟的主人听了妻子对他说的话“你的奴仆对我做了这样的事”，他的怒气就发作了。
